column25:
RAE stands for Respond, Act, Execute and even if I do not get accepted, it'd be nice if you adopted this. 

RAE is our structured response method for handling serious emergencies. Use it only when absolutely necessary.

1. Respond

Assess the situation:
    •    Is this an emergency requiring immediate action?
    •    Will it impact server stability or player experience?
    •    Is RAE the appropriate response?

2. Act

Plan your response:
    •    What steps need to be taken?
    •    Does the server need to be locked down?
    •    Is a higher-up, owner or a Manager already handling it?

3. Execute

Take action and immediately notify Owners via ping or DM.

When to Use RAE
    •    Raids – Coordinated server or Discord attacks
    •    DOXX attacks – Unauthorized personal information leaks
    •    DDoS attacks – Server disruption via denial-of-service attacks
    •    Security breaches – Unauthorized admin/staff access
    •    Severe griefing – Large-scale destruction of builds or infrastructure
    •    Bot spam attacks – Excessive bot activity disrupting operations
    •    Server crashes due to exploits – Repeated intentional crashes
    •    Mass rule-breaking – Widespread hacking, exploiting, or severe violations

This should be a common staff procedure, not really for players. 

~Thanks!
